name: Splasher Blashter
description: The Splasher Blashter is a bandit-made E-tech shotgun. It inherits the usual bandit traits: poor accuracy, slow reloads and a big magazine, while E-tech converts shells into energy charges. Each trigger pull fires a three-round burst of large, slow energy orbs that arc through the air and hit hard. The weapon burns 4 shotgun ammo per burst, so the oversized magazine matters less. Despite the cost, it is still very efficient and powerful for an E-tech shotgun, though many purple-and-above non E-tech shotguns can outperform it for damage per shot and per ammo.
notes: Can roll a critical hit damage accessory even though it cannot score critical hits. Cannot roll the vertical grip, and cannot spawn with the Assssult prefix (so it cannot gain a x5 projectile variant). Jumping and firing at the ground can give a small extra lift, at the cost of moderate self-damage. Its projectiles are classed as rockets; Absorb shields that convert shots can return launcher ammo. Manufacturer: Bandit. Weapon type: E-tech shotgun.
